surface_verification.justification: Framework tooling + curated-doc change (new agent_doc_shape gate + CLI + F11 verifier, aggregate_decisions dedup, write_decision_log canonicalization, architecture.md/conventions.md refresh). This monorepo is a Claude-Code plugin library — no runnable app surface (web/cli/api) is added or changed; verified end-to-end by the pytest suites exercising the producer->file->consumer round-trip.

behaviors.behavior: aggregator skips the dup ADR-NNN append when the F2 run_id bullet is documented in the target section
aggregator appends the canonical fallback when the run_id is undocumented / only in prose (section-scoped, not whole-file)
direct write_decision_log path is untouched and emits the canonical <Impact> — sentence. -> pointer bullet
canonical writer collapses multi-line summaries to one bullet (no injected bullet, no double period)
shape gate rejects Campaign/sub_iterate/free-text anchors, missing Impact separator, and a non-decision_log/archive arrow
shape gate accepts canonical run_id + ADR-NNN + archive anchors; grandfathers undated/pre-cutoff
shape gate is forward-only (legacy untouched entry not flagged) and blocks a new non-canonical bullet vs the git base
check_agent_doc_shape is registered in run_all_checks (F11 composition) and fail-soft SKIPs without a git base
the real monorepo architecture.md + conventions.md ## …Updates tails are canonical full-corpus (normalization locked)
System-Overview mermaid renders correctly in the user's viewer
behaviors.reason: the portable rewrite was empirically validated to PARSE under Mermaid v11 and to contain no  /glued-subgraph/internal-direction, but the actual visual render in a given renderer is a human judgement
